parameters.query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(s1.XSAL_0, s2.XSAL_0, 'CODE_NON_TROUVE') as XSAL_0,
  '{{ $json.MAT }}' as XMAT_0_ORIGINAL,
  CASE 
    WHEN s1.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN '{{ $json.MAT }}'
    WHEN s2.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('00', '{{ $json.MAT }}')
    ELSE NULL
  END as XMAT_0_UTILISE,
  CASE 
    WHEN s1.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN 'TROUVE_DIRECT'
    WHEN s2.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL THEN 'TROUVE_AVEC_00'
    ELSE 'NON_TROUVE'
  END as STATUT
FROM (SELECT '{{ $json.MAT }}' as MAT) v
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s1 ON s1.XMAT_0 = v.MAT
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s2 ON s2.XMAT_0 = CONCAT('00', v.MAT)
